script: echo === heather ALLOWED + aad gates ===; sudo grep -nE 'ALLOWED|HEATHER_AAD|YOO_AAD|aadObjectId' /home/heather/heather-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -15; echo; echo === alejandro gates ===; sudo grep -nE 'aadObjectId|ALEJANDRO_AAD|YOO_AAD|OWNER_AAD|GUEST_AAD|ALLOWED' /home/alejandro/alejandro-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -20
